# Kaiya Taxi

> Kaiya Taxi is a licensed private transfer and taxi company based in Chitose, Hokkaido, Japan. We provide premium airport transfers, private transportation, and sightseeing services across Hokkaido with professional drivers and well-maintained vehicles.

## About
Kaiya Taxi operates from Chitose, Hokkaido, serving travelers throughout the Hokkaido region. We are a fully licensed transportation company offering safe, comfortable, and reliable rides. Our drivers are professional, courteous, and experienced in navigating Hokkaido's roads in all seasons.

## Services
- **Airport Transfer**: Private transfers between New Chitose Airport (CTS) and hotels, resorts, or any Hokkaido destination
- **Hotel Transfer**: Direct transfers between hotels, resorts, and accommodations across Hokkaido
- **Hourly Charter**: Flexible sightseeing with a private driver — explore Hokkaido at your own pace
- **Point-to-Point Transfer**: Door-to-door private transportation to any location in Hokkaido
- **Sightseeing Day Tours**: Curated day trips to Niseko, Furano, Otaru, Lake Toya, Noboribetsu, and more

## Vehicles
- Compact Sedan (1–4 passengers, 2 luggage)
- Minivan (1–6 passengers, 4 luggage)
- Comfort Van (1–7 passengers, 4 luggage)
- Premium SUV (1–4 passengers, 2 luggage)
- 10-Seater Van (1–9 passengers, 9 luggage)

## Coverage Areas
All of Hokkaido, including: Sapporo, Chitose, New Chitose Airport, Niseko, Furano, Otaru, Rusutsu, Kiroro, Lake Toya, Noboribetsu, Asahikawa, Hakodate, Tomamu, and any other Hokkaido destination.

## Booking
- **Online Booking**: https://book.kaiya.taxi/
- **Phone**: +81-80-8293-8862
- **Email**: c.contact@kaiya.taxi
- **Website**: https://kaiya.taxi/

## Key Features
- Licensed and insured transportation company
- Professional, vetted drivers
- Real-time flight tracking for airport pickups
- Free waiting time at airports (60 minutes domestic, 90 minutes international)
- 24/7 availability
- Transparent, upfront pricing with no hidden fees
- Child seats available upon request
- Wheelchair-accessible vehicles available
- Multilingual support (English, Chinese, Korean, Thai, Vietnamese, French)

## Business Information
- **Business Name**: Kaiya Taxi
- **Location**: Shinano 4-11-4-2F-C, Chitose, Hokkaido, Japan
- **Operating Hours**: 24 hours, 7 days a week
- **Payment Methods**: Credit Card, Bank Transfer, Cash
- **Currency**: JPY (Japanese Yen)

## Languages Supported
English, French, Chinese (Simplified), Korean, Thai, Vietnamese
